title: Card
description: Displays content in a structured container with header, body, and footer sections.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install required utilities for styling and class merging.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the card component code.

usage.import: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic card with header, content, and footer.

examples.title: With Image
examples.description: A card with a full-width image at the top, useful for blog posts or media content.
examples.code:
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, Button } from "@repo/components"; export default function CardWithImage() { return (
Mountain Trail A scenic hike through alpine meadows.

Explore breathtaking views at 3,200m elevation. Suitable for intermediate hikers.

); }

examples.title: Profile Card
examples.description: A centered profile card with avatar initials, name, and action buttons.
examples.code:
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, Button } from "@repo/components"; export default function CardProfile() { return (
JD
Jane Doe Product Designer · San Francisco

Crafting beautiful digital experiences with a focus on accessibility and usability.

); }

examples.title: Stats Card
examples.description: Multiple compact metric cards displaying key numbers and trends.

examples.title: Custom Styling
examples.description: Card with a scale-up hover effect via a Tailwind className.
